positive: A stylized and whimsical forest scene, featuring a silhouette of an abstract, leaping fox mid-jump, surrounded by intricate, gothic-inspired foliage and glowing bioluminescent mushrooms. The design should be highly graphic, favoring deep indigo and emerald green tones contrasted with clean white negative space. Composition must be perfectly centered and symmetrical, designed for a seamless repeating pattern on apparel. Use thick, clean linework, strong contrast, and excellent negative space separation. Vector art style, minimalist detail, perfect for screen printing.
